response.text:

rationale: Your SoC (0.33) exceeds my minimum threshold (0.30) by only 0.03 frac, insufficient margin given my conservative policy requiring 0.50 frac before sharing; accepting would deplete my buffer below safe operating levels and contradict my recovery strategy.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
